# About Culture Things

> Private Sintra day tours with Rita Almeida, a Sintra-born guide. Two private-only routes (5–7 hours), max 4 guests, Lisbon pickup, 5.0 TripAdvisor rating, and free reschedule/cancellation with 24 hours' notice. Pena Palace viewpoints, Atlantic coast, Cascais, and hidden beaches.

About Culture Things hosts premium private tours in Sintra and along Portugal's Atlantic coast. Every tour is private (never mixed groups), guided by Rita Almeida who was born and raised in Sintra. Book by messaging Rita on WhatsApp to check dates, payment options, and booking details; Rita usually replies within 24 hours. Languages: English, Spanish, Portuguese.

## Tours

- [Sintra Complete Experience & Atlantic Coast](https://aboutculturethings.com/#tours): 7-hour private tour, €299 per private group (max 4). Historic Sintra, Pena area, Cabo da Roca, Cascais. Lisbon pickup included; palace tickets not included.
- [Sintra & Hidden Beaches Experience](https://aboutculturethings.com/#tours): 5-hour private tour, €275 per private group (max 4). Sintra hills, hidden coves, Azenhas do Mar. Lisbon pickup included.

## Key pages

- [Why choose us](https://aboutculturethings.com/#benefits): Private pacing, local insight, and easy booking from WhatsApp to pickup.
- [About Rita Almeida](https://aboutculturethings.com/#about): Founder and private guide — born in Sintra, 5.0 TripAdvisor, speaks PT, EN, ES.
- [Reviews](https://aboutculturethings.com/#reviews): 5.0/5 on TripAdvisor — 6 reviews, all 5-star.
- [How booking works & FAQ](https://aboutculturethings.com/#faq): Five common questions about tours, booking, cancellation, pickup, and customization.
- [Book a tour](https://aboutculturethings.com/#final-cta): Message Rita on WhatsApp or email to check availability.

## Contact

- [WhatsApp +351 968 510 019](https://wa.me/351968510019): Primary booking channel; typical reply within 24h.

- [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/aboutculturethings/): @aboutculturethings
